calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Geraldine Armendariz, Esq. 415-986-0873 for Moving party.
Weiland Chiang, Esq. 510-457-3468 of Hartsuyker, Stratman & Williams-Abrego for Defendant Spencer Hansen.
Jose Morales, 510-837-5367, Plaintiff. (appears late at 9:45 am, after both lawyers have left.)***

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

GERLADINE ARMENDARIZ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)***

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

***Plaintiff appears late, the matter is recalled at 9:45 am and the Court informs Plaintiff of its ruling and order it has signed.***
